message:
fix(service): prevent buffer pending slot leak on panic in call()

BufferFuture::poll() replaced state with Done before calling
inner.call(). If call() panicked, Drop saw Done and skipped the
pending decrement, permanently leaking a buffer slot.

Fix: restore WaitingForReady with a cloned shared Arc before call(),
so if call() panics, Drop still sees a state with the shared ref and
decrements pending correctly.

Audit batch 405: retry.rs SOUND + buffer.rs 1 MEDIUM FIXED

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
